title: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat
message_html: CRCL Sell-Off 'Looks Overdone' Say Analysts as Circle CEO Addresses Open USD Threat ...
snippet: Analysts don't think the threat of a new stablecoin launch was enough to warrant a major Circle (CRCL) sell-off on Tuesday.
